programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the krabby patty formula; the citizens of Bikini Bottom clamor for Patrick's artwork after an art critic praises him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get lost during a family road trip to the Great Barrier Reef.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob thinks Mr. Krabs is a robot; SpongeBob and Patrick care for an abandoned baby clam.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs takes Pearl and SpongeBob on a vacation to the Ocean Mint.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get caught in the feud between a crew of ghost pirates and the Flying Dutchman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick learn the secret origins of Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy; Plankton grows a second eye and becomes nice.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs asks SpongeBob to help Pearl get rid of a barnacle on her face; SpongeBob asks Patrick to watch Gary while he's away.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob house-sits for Sandy; SpongeBob and Squidward go to the Kelpy G concert.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally destroy Sandy's air supply and have to help her find more oxygen; SpongeBob wants to earn his belt from karate master Fuzzy Acorns with Sandy's help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty with disastrous results; SpongeBob creates a buddy out of bubbles when none of his friends have time to play with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward issues a restraining order against SpongeBob; Plankton mistakenly believes that a piece of art is a stolen krabby patty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward has trouble recalling his happiest memory; SpongeBob and Sandy must defeat an evil Jellien overlord who has replaced everyone with clones.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs is forced to give out free food to win back customers; SpongeBob needs all of his friends to help him remodel his pineapple home.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Cuando Luan escucha por casualidad a sus hermanos quejándose de su comedia, ella decide abandonarla; los niños deciden no contarle a Leni sobre la próxima fiesta de su madre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y su papá van a "Leyendas del Templo Oculto" y no pueden esperar ni un minuto para pasar un día juntos entre padre e hijo; Lincoln quiere ir al centro comercial, pero tiene que cuidar a sus hermanas menores, por lo que decide llevarlas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La familia participa en un concurso de lectura en la biblioteca, pero Lola no quiere unirse. Lincoln sospecha que sus padres le ocultan algo sobre sus orígenes cuando descubre que su álbum de bebé tiene la primera página totalmente en blanco.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Los niños le dan un viejo muñeco que canta a Lily para detener su llanto, pero rápidamente los vuelve locos; los chicos intentan convencer a Papá de la nueva tecnología cuando le declara la guerra a los dispositivos electrónicos.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln quiere el sofá para ver su programa favorito, pero sus hermanas no le dejan; Lincoln le deja un mensaje a Lori en su correo de voz, pero se arrepiente enseguida y busca la manera de eliminarlo antes de que Lori lo escuche.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln está cansado de que sus hermanas se entrometan en su vida, pero su opinión cambia cuando se burlan de él en la escuela; Lincoln graba los momentos más embarazosos de sus hermanas.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja decide tratar de vivir con las medusas; Calamardo intenta vender su casa a pesar de sus vecinos molestos.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Hay un concurso de talentos en el Rusty Krusty en "Culture Shock" y en "F.U.N." Bob Esponja decide tratar de entablar amistad con el malvado Plancton.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja ordena unas armas falsas; Calamardo finge ser un fantasma.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja lleva a la hija de Don Cangrejo al baile escolar. Bob Esponja y Calamardo compiten por ser el empleado del mes.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: En `SB-129', Calamardo accidentalmente se encuentra a sí mismo en el futuro, y para su sorpresa extraña a Bob Esponja, luego en `Karate Choppers', Bob Esponja y Sandy descubren el karate.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: En `Sleepy Time' Bob Esponja visita los sueños de sus amigos y vecinos. Mientras que en `Suds', Bob Esponja llega con una enfermedad que lo transforma en fabricante de burbujas.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo convence a Bob Esponja y Patricio de unirse a él en una búsqueda del tesoro. Bob Esponja se sube al autobús equivocado.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja deja a todo el mundo enojado con sus bromas del Día de los Inocentes; Bob Esponja tiene el reto de cocinar para el Rey Neptuno y decide participar en un concurso entre cocineros.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo advierte a SpongeBob que se mantenga alejado de los anzuelos; Bob Esponja convoca a su héroes favoritos para las emergencias.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Patricio y Bob Esponja aprenden a atar sus zapatos; Calamardo está a cargo del Crustáceo Cascarudo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Todo Fondo de Bikini huye de Bob Esponja y Patricio le dice que es por ser feo, pero en realidad tiene mal aliento; Perlita obtiene un trabajo en el Crustaceo Cascarudo, se encarga de ponerlo a la moda.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Patricio está encantado cuando recibe un premio, pero por desgracia, era para Bob Esponja; luego, Bob Esponja hace un nuevo amigo, una burbuja que le hace compañía, lo que hace que la gente piense que está loco.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja tiene que lidiar con unas peligrosas bombas-tartas piratas; luego, Plankton construye un falso Don Cangrejo para obtener la receta de Krabby Patty.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja inventa hamburguesas con colores; Sandy pone a Bob Esponja y a Patricio a cuidar de su oruga.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se pregunta si se puede ser grande y todavía besar a su abuela; Calamardo se muda de Fondo de Bikini.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se esconde de Sandy; Bob Esponja y Patricio piden prestado un globo de una tienda y accidentalmente lo revientan.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio se cuelan en Treedome; Gary sigue a Patricio por los alrededores y Bob Esponja se pone celoso.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: La Sra. Puff hará cualquier cosa para asegurarse que Bob Esponja pase su examen de manejo y Bob Esponja descubre que su héroe no es tan importante.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: SpongeBob cuenta chistes maliciosos; SpongeBob falla su examen de conducir; SpongeBob cuida el hogar de Mermaid Man y Barnacle Boy.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja sigue a Arenita en una serie de actividades extremas; luego, Bob Esponja trata de ocultar lo que le hizo a una ostra en el zoológico.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja va a trabajar para Plankton; Bob Esponja crea un GarabatoEsponja, quien le juega bromas a todo el mundo, obligando a Bob Esponja a borrarlo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony is ready to discover what it is that makes Laos so unique.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony experiences the building boom that has taken place in Dubai.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony Bourdain explores life in the magical Indian region of Rajasthan.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony travels through Brooklyn for the last episode of No Reservations.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony explores Japan through the culinary phenomenon that is "Cook it Raw.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony's adventure in Seoul, South Korea, includes kimchi and tae kwon do.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony visits Kerala, an Indian state untouched by Western franchises.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony explores the gorgeous scenery and an evolving food scene in Vancouver.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony travels to Jamaica to uncover the lesser-known region.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain heads to New Zealand to discover the real Kiwi lifestyle.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony and his crew get stuck in the middle of an intense military conflict.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony visits China's Macau, the gambling capital of the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony travels around Emilia Romagna in a Ferrari with Chef Michael White.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony finds the real Puerto Rico, away from the cruise ships and crowds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Hong Kong is a mecca of food in Asia and Tony arrives ready to take it on.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: John weighs almost 700 pounds and couldn't be happier. HIs girlfriend Kim goes so far as to make him choose between her and a 10-foot long sandwich! He chooses the sandwich.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Crystal found evidence to believe that Chad may really be stepping out on their marriage. Then, Shanna is here to confront her boyfriend Kevin because she has evidence to believe that he's been sleeping with other women!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kassi is here because she can't believe that her ex-boyfriend left her for their roommate. Then it's a sister show down when these two go head to head for the love of the same man. Plus, Bryan's girlfriend Brandy is here to tell him a secret.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mike's wife of 20 years, Beverly, left him 5 months ago and has been living with an "old flame!" Then Christine has been sleeping with her husband's friend! She says he drove her to it since he treats her badly.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Black wants to leave his fiance Justine to be with a woman named Star. But he's about to find out that Star is actually a man. Then, Jay has to reveal to Brittany the shocking secret that he slept with her sister Donna.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Bev will see her son for the first time in 7 years and find out why he left! Then Joyce suspects that her granddaughter is prostituting out of their home! Later Jenna confesses to her girlfriend, Stephanie, that she's been cheating with her mother!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Emotional Jamie is torn between her husband and her live-in boyfriend. She says she loves them both and is not even sure whose baby she is carrying! Next Dana and Steve are here to convince their daughter that she cannot marry her cousin!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Anita is ready to dump her husband for her ex-lover. Next Theresa is cheating on her fiancé with his brother! Later Kevin is here to ell his girlfriend's ex, Jermaine, to back off.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Buddy spends his days smoking and playing videos games, rather than providing for his family. His girlfriend Holly works to provide for everyone including their special needs child, but is fed up!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Aeshia’s here to prove to Terrence and his wife Lashondra that Terrence is the father of her child, but Lashondra knows she’s wrong! Both Shaunah and Chris have convinced themselves that they’re being cheated on. Who’s the father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Kayla's madly in love with Levi, her baby's father, whom she's been dating for years. But this relationship is far from ordinary. A few months back, Kayla's 17-year-old sister accused Levi of taking advantage of her while sleeping.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Megan wanted to find out if her boyfriend Devin was cheating. But even darker relationship secrets surfaced! Plus, you'll be shocked to find out why Laura and Steven need Steve's help again!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Robert believes his wife may have faked her pregnancy and the miscarriage just to keep him around! Demetrius thinks Nikki is lying to him and seeing other men on the side. Nikki wants to put these accusations to rest.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: The laziest husband and wife lie about their child in order to get support from a woman who believes the child is her grandchild.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas madres están desesperadas por encontrar a los padres desaparecidos de sus hijos. Pero estos padres que niegan que son los verdaderos padres y dicen que es imposible que lo sean.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estos invitados dicen que están seguros de saber quién es el padre de sus hijos, pero necesitan una prueba de ADN para comprobarlo. Ahora los resultados están a punto de descubrirse, pero ¿serán los resultados que esperaban?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas parejas decidieron hacer un trío que terminó en un embarazo. Ahora que los bebés han nacido, estos hombres niegan ser los padres. Hoy se verán obligados a reconocer la verdad.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La familia de Jackie no confía en su novio cuando está con sus hijos, pero ella insiste en seguir con él. ¿Qué horrible verdad revelará la prueba del detector de mentiras de Shaqualla sobre su novio?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Katrina cree que el novio de su hermana Kendra es un infiel y que tiene sexo con su mejor amiga, Nay-Nay. Después, John vuelve al escenario con algo sorprendente.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Teneal y Richard cuentan historias diferentes, cada uno alegando que el otro no es apto para ser padre. La verdad se limitará a una prueba con el detector de mentiras, y los resultados serán impactantes.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Hoy Danny por fin está listo para enfrentarse al hombre ausente de su vida y responder a las preguntas de su vida. Steven da varias excusas para no ver a su hijo, pero ¿es posible redimirse?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Cuando la gente normal necesita ayuda, Steve Wilkos está listo para responder a la llamada. Mira cómo Steve ayuda a la gente normal a defenderse y a luchar por sus creencias para promover la justicia para todos.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Tres años más tarde, Elizabeth todavía tiene muchas dudas sobre las intenciones de Manny con su familia y su marido Rodney está en medio. ¿Manny es inocente?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he's always out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn't want Earnie's ex Tenyia to live with them just because she's the mother of his child.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Joyia está desesperada por evitar que su amiga Stephanie vuelva con su problemático ex Scott. ¡Pero ella todavía lo ama! ¿Tendrá la voluntad de dejarlo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Jack está preocupado por sus nietos porque su nuera Carol ha sido negligente y tiene mal genio. Después, Kendra explica por qué de repente dio el bebé de Corey en adopción.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La adolescente Megan vive con su antiguo novio controlador Rick. Megan no puede ir a la escuela, buscar trabajo, ni comer sin su permiso. ¿Pueden su tía y Steve lograr hacerla entender?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Dennis afirma que su ex-novia Kendal lo mantiene amarrado con mentiras sobre su embarazo. ¡Quiere saber si es el padre de su hija! ¿Finalmente los resultados de la prueba de ADN de Steve les permitirán seguir adelante?

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura se sorprende muchísimo cuando Fidela le dice que dios hará el milagro de salvar a su hija. Patricio se niega a cenar y cuando Camelia le pregunta dice que no sabe nada de Sonia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En la clínica todos están consternados por el accidente de Caridad. Al rato llega Luis Mario y Bruno, quienes cuentan que Caridad tenía algo muy importante que decirle.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Marybella y Eduarda celebran la noticia que Silvano y Rosaura se van a casar, ya que de esta manera Rosaura se irá de la vida de Luis Mario. Mientras tanto Doña Cruz trata de reprender a los niños.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura entra a la habitación de la clínica donde está Angeliquita y le pregunta a la enfermera que dijeron los médicos y ella le responde que la niña se está recuperando satisfactoriamente.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luisana encuentra a Eduarda y le pregunta porque esta ahí con Caridad. Eduarda disimulando su plan le dice que está visitándola por la salud de Caridad y que ella la quiere como una nana.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Caridad le va a contar todo a Luis Mario pero en ese momento llega la enfermera y le dice a Luis Mario que Caridad se encuentra muy mal y que por el momento no puede hablar porque se agita mucho.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio, acompañado de Camelia, se encuentra con Luis Mario y Marybella en la borda de un barco. Allí Patricio aprovecha la oportunidad de descargar su ira tocando el punto débil de Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Jimena despide a Guillermo en el hospital donde esta Caridad hospitalizada y en ese momento llega Iván y los ve besándose, mientras Silvano le dice a Luisana que Rosaura termino con él.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura está ilusionada con reunir junto a su hija y Luis Mario para ser felices. Piensa mucho en ellos. De momento desea comunicarse con Luis Mario para proponerle reconciliación.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Silvano le pide a Guillermo que por favor se apure en conseguir una modelo para un comercial de vino y en esos momentos llega Rosaura y Guillermo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le reclama a Marybella el hecho de haberlo tenido engañado durante tanto tiempo, porque ya se enteró que ella puede ver. Marybella llorando le pide por Dios, que por favor la perdone.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio le exige a Rosaura que le de una explicación sobre el viaje que realizo con Silvano pero ella se niega hablar de eso. Ademas, Luis Mario está decidido a echar Marybella de la casa.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rodrigo y María Julia están visitando a Karina en la clínica pero abandonan el cuarto porque la enfermera le dice que el doctor tiene que hablar con ellos.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio llega a la oficina y se encuentra con Silvano, a quien no quiere que este presente en el acto, pero Patricio acepta que Silvano revise los documentos.

programme.title: Real America With Dan Ball
programme.desc: Real America with Dan Ballbrings you the latest political headlines, by interviewing news makers of the day, to include politicians, lawmakers, pundits, celebrities and social media influencers.

programme.title: Tipping Point With Kara McKinney

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle for Block B hits a crescendo as King Elizabello II prepares his devastating King Punch! But as the powerful attack becomes imminent, the Prodence Kingdom faction unravels! All that may be pointless, though.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the handover team approaches Green Bit, they are attacked by the fearsome fish that live off the coast of Dressrosa. But that's the least of their problems as they find the bridge to Green Bit has collapsed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro tracks the thief who stole his sword - and learns about a danger facing the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Law, Usopp, and the others arrive at Green Bit only to find it inhabited by strange creatures, and swarming with the Navy soldiers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All but done for, Sanji is trapped by Violet and her crew when she suddenly changes her mind and mysteriously turns on her own men! Meanwhile, Robin and Usopp come face to face with the Little People known as the Tontatta Tribe.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji gets in touch with Law in order to share a shocking secret - that could unsettle the Straw Hats' plans in Dressrosa for good! Meanwhile, Luffy's Block C battle begins, but will his Gum-Gum powers give him away?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Franky try to regroup after Doflamingo's betrayal, hoping that destroying the factory is not yet out of their grasp. Meanwhile Luffy makes a friend in the Colosseum and Usopp ends up thrust into an uncomfortable position!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Sunny is mysteriously deformed by the bizarre powers of Giolla! Can Nami, Chopper, and Brook act in time to save their beloved home? Meanwhile, the battle for Block C continues as Luffy suffers a staggering setback.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After knocking down the Giant, Hajrudin, as payback for what he did to Ucy, Luffy has to deal with Ideo, whose punch has the destructive force of a bomb, while the Funk Brothers show off their bizarre fighting technique.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Chopper, and Brooke keep trying to evade Jora and win back the Sunny even though it's been turned into a piece of art! In the Colosseum, Don Chin Jao finally faces Luffy - whose power will prove greater?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy stands along against Don Chinjao, and learns about the old grudge he bears against Garp! Meanwhile, Usopp and Robin get swept up in the Tontatta Kingdom's raid against the royal family, and Franky learns the eerie secret of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontatta Kingdom gears up for its all-out assault on the Doflamingo Family, as Usopp and Robin are caught up in the war effort! Meanwhile, Franky arrives the headquarters of the toy movement where he finds Zoro, Nami & the others are cornered by Jora.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chin Jao's hatred of Garp and Luffy is finally explained, while his battle against Luffy comes to an end. With tremendous power, one of them is squarely eliminated! But is that really the end of the Colosseum battle?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the battle with Don Chinjao long behind him, Luffy advances to the final round! Block-D contender Cavendish, however, takes the chance and pounces on Luffy, who is defended by an unlikely ally! The agenda of Colosseum gladiator Rebecca is exposed.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Rebecca's deep bonds with the one-legged toy soldier are revealed! Her lineage can be traced to the previous ruler of Dressrosa - and her eternal bond with the damaged toy is linked to the violent overthrow of that regime by none other than Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Rebecca enters the ring for the battle for Block D, the crowd shows its contempt for her heritage - only to be scolded by an unlikely supporter. Meanwhile, the other Straw Hats start to reassemble to deal with the attack on the Sunny.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Doflamingo recounts for Law the surprising history of the Don Quixote Family, while Nami and the others battle the insane and powerful artist, Giolla! Her ultimate attack renders them incapacitated, and prompts the betrayal of one of their closest allies!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law is pinned by Fujitora, and Doflamingo has the upper hand! Only the most cunning of tricks could save Law's plan to hand Caesar over to Nami & the others! Meanwhile, the Sunny falls into danger again, & the battle for Block D heats up in the Colosseum.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law must put himself in harm's way to defend the Sunny and the Straw Hats from Doflamingo's all-out assault! With barely enough time to save the crew, plans change and send the Sunny on a new mission -- but will it be able to get underway?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law & Doflamingo are embroiled in a heated showdown which triggers Momonosuke's memories of Doflamingo's cruelty from the first time they met; meanwhile, after a tearful fanboy conversation Zoro finally gets to see Luffy but all eyes are fixed on Rebecca.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bartolomeo searches the Colosseum for Luffy but stumbles upon the medical center for the losers of the battles in the ring, but is everything at this center as it seems? Meanwhile, Rebecca has to fend off Rolling Logan's vicious bone-crushing grip attack.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The losers of the Colosseum battle who are being held below the infirmary have a surprising person in their midst! But do they have a clue as to their terrifying fate? Meanwhile, the Tontatta Kingdom's history is made clear.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bartolomeo finally finds Luffy and starts to lead him to Zoro, while the toy soldier begins to tell the heart-breaking story of how Doflamingo cheated the Riku dynasty out of their control of Dressrosa!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the toy soldier's story continues, the sad fate of King Riku and his army, and his daughter Princess Viola, is revealed as well as how the people of Dressrosa fell into the hands of Doflamingo. And all the toys in the country share a mysterious secret.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Kin'emon, and Luffy are reunited again, but little do they know that their reunion is being monitored by a potential threat! Meanwhile, the battle rages on between Doflamingo and Law as these two powerhouses clash.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Kin'emon make a mad dash to save Law but Navy Admiral Fujitora stands in their way, bringing his full power against them. The Navy is in hot pursuit as a ship approaches with unexpected visitors from the past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After revealing the horrible history of Dressrosa, Toy Soldier now shares their plan to liberate the Tontatta Kingdom and bring down the Doflamingo Family, Operation SOP. Luffy bumps into a heavily-wounded Bellamy and Bartolomeo

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp and Robin make their way via an underground tunnel dug by the tiny people of the Tontatta Tribe - a tunnel so small in fact, that Franky couldn't fit! Instead, Franky makes his way to the Toy House.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: J. Alexander shocks the girls with a scary lesson on perfecting their runway walk while wearing straightjackets.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Benny Ninja gives the girls a lesson on how to pose with movement. The models must pose in the air while jumping on a trampoline, some girls rise while others flop.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens hit the streets of Hollywood to prank unsuspecting passers-by. RuPaul's extra special guest judges are funny lady Rachel Dratch and the world's first supermodel, Janice Dickinson.

programme.desc: Legendary children Kady Z, Jillian Hervey and Kelly Osbourne join the queens to form All Star girl groups in a battle of the divas for the fiercest set. Rosie Perez and Mary Wilson of the Supremes guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: Worlds collide when a Centurion, commander of Rome's bone-crushing army, takes on a Rajput, India's greatest fighter.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior

programme.title: Alone

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Meet the 10 new participants on Alone Season 2 and see what it takes to make the cut. From exhaustive skills tests to camera and safety training.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four new bladesmiths must forge a bayonet blade and engineer it to attach to a rifle. Then, the final two bladesmiths have five days at home forging the legendary African blade, the Zulu Iklwa.

programme.title: Forged in Fire

programme.desc: When new information on an old case comes to light, Don thinks he may have sent the wrong person to jail.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team must stop a sniper who goes on a killing spree in Los Angles.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team tries to locate the son of a billionaire who disappears after piloting a small plane that crashes in the woods. Recurring guest star VANESSA MARCIL appears as Kim Marcus.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing reporter who recently wrote an exposé about a corrupt politician. NICHOLLE TOM ("The Nanny") and ADAM KAUFMAN guest star.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team tries to locate a teenager who was last seen in an amateur video being psychologically tormented by an unseen abductor.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack searches for his daughter Hannah's (VANESSA MARANO) boyfriend after he runs away from home. Recurring guest star ADAM KAUFMAN appears as Brian Donovan.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a man who disappears after a late-night dive, and Danny and Elena take their relationship to another level. MARTIN LANDAU and ADAM KAUFMAN guest star.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and his team investigate the case of a 28-year-old marketing executive, Maggie Cartwright, who seems to have simply walked away from her life, leaving everything behind.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and his team search for an 11-year-old boy, Gabe (DAVID HENRIE), who disappears from a subway station en route to Yankee Stadium for what was to be his birthday celebration.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Duncan Muller realizes that he needs to go back into a store to retrieve his credit card. After he walks away, his wife's car speeds off, leaving a bystander injured.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The agents must find a woman, Eve, who changes her appearance to suit whatever modeling or acting job she is seeking. No one seems to know Eve well, including her roommate.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and his squad search for 17-year-old Andy Deaver, who was last seen by the charismatic headmaster of Spalding Academy, the private boarding school Andy attends.

programme.title: Boondock Saints
programme.desc: Two Irish Catholic brothers become vigilantes and wipe out Boston's criminal underworld in the name of God.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: The story of Richard Kuklinski, the notorious contract killer and family man. When finally arrested in 1986, neither his wife nor daughters had any clue about his real profession.

programme.title: Hoodlum

programme.title: Boondock Saints

programme.title: Close Range
programme.desc: A rogue soldier turned outlaw is thrust into a relentless fight with a corrupt sheriff, his obedient deputies, and a dangerous drug cartel in order to protect his family.

programme.title: Mommie Dearest
programme.desc: The public Crawford was strong-willed, glamorous and admirable, but Mommie Dearest reveals the private Crawford, the woman desperate to be a mother, adopting her children when she was single and trying to survive in the devastating movie industry.

programme.title: Las flores de la guerra
programme.desc: Las Flores regresan a su región después de ser desplazadas por la violencia. Una nueva amenaza las atormenta, pero deciden no dar marcha a tras.

programme.title: Agua seca
programme.desc: Agua seca' comienza cuando Paulo Duarte, un hombre portugués, es encontrado muerto en el Puerto de Vigo. Parece un suicidio, pero nadie a su alrededor puede entender por qué se suicida.

programme.title: Agua seca
programme.desc: Después de que la policía encontró armas en el departamento de Paulo, el inspector Viñas y su compañera, Gabriela, profundizan en la investigación de la muerte de Paulo y el suicidio se convierte en un asesinato para ellos.

programme.title: Agua seca
programme.desc: Las últimas pistas encontradas por la policía les hacen pensar que Paulo estaba traficando con armas ilegalmente.

programme.title: Agua seca
programme.desc: Tras sufrir un atentado en la sede de Luanda, Mauro no ha tenido otra opción que enviar finalmente las armas a sus clientes en África.

programme.title: Agua seca
programme.desc: Gracias a Teresa, los inspectores han descubierto que Silvia era la novia de Paulo y la han interrogado. Mientras los inspectores se preguntan sobre el papel de Silvia en la investigación, los hombres de Mauro esperan la llegada de las armas.

programme.title: Agua seca
programme.desc: Después de que Silvia confesara que mató a Rafa, Mauro e Irene se preguntan cómo pueden ayudar a su hija. Por su parte, la policía ya ha encontrado el cuerpo de Rafa y busca activamente a Leo, al que creen culpable de su muerte.

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso
programme.desc: Cuando un policía británico es encontrado asesinado en la pequeña isla paradisíaca de Saint-Marie, el detective Richard Poole es enviado a investigar. Sería el hombre perfecto para resolver el caso, si no fuera porque odia el sol, el mar y la arena.

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso
programme.desc: Mientras el detective anda en busca de una taza decente de té, una novia es asesinada el día de su boda. Es una tragedia que la sargenta Bordey no puede sino notificar, mientras que Richard está más interesado en las señales de los quehaceres domésticos.

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer no solo predice su propia muerte, sino que además brinda una descripción del asesinato, todo resulta aparentemente fácil para el detective Poole. ¿Puede un caso del pasado ayudar a resolver un crimen del presente?

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso
programme.desc: Una confesión de asesinato resulta problemática para el detective Poole y el equipo, cuando una esposa admite haber matado a su esposo, pero no se logra encontrar el cuerpo. ¿Podrá Richard resolver el misterio?

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso
programme.desc: La investigación de un asesinato se torna más que personal para Richard, cuando la víctima es asesinada ¡mientras él lo tenía esposado! Su trabajo está en riesgo y precisa de todo su rigor británico para llegar al fondo del misterio de Paradise Beach...

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Kung-Fu Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team travels to China in search of the Yeren, a bipedal, hair-covered ape similar to Bigfoot. Little is known about this elusive creature, but the team uses their bigfooting skills to try and prove China's Yeren is more than just legend.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Sketching Sasquatch
programme.desc: The team travels to the California/Nevada border to investigate audio recordings of a possible sasquatch obtained near Lake Tahoe. While blasting calls throughout multiple valleys in the Sierras, they discover some of their best evidence to date.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Lonestar Sasquatch
programme.desc: The team travels to East Texas to investigate thermal footage that may show a bigfoot spying on a campsite. Convinced by the evidence, they enlist the aid of primate tracking dogs in hopes of proving bigfoots do roam the Lonestar State.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Big Sky Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team travels to Big Sky Country to investigate sasquatch activity near the city of Bozeman, MT. After meeting witnesses, they enlist the aid of a dog sled team to take them into a nearby valley, where they set up a fake deer trap to lure a bigfoot.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre esposado apuesta que puede escapar de los agentes. Un joven no puede negar la evidencia que lo incrimina de robo. Hay chispas cuando un hombre se fuga en alta velocidad con su familia dentro.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una madre con una orden judicial no logra evadir a la policía. Se detiene a un delincuente de tránsito habitual. Se reporta una pelea y los policías encuentran evidencia de una discusión sangrienta.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Charmed

programme.desc: When Paige and Phoebe summon Grams for Chris' Wiccaning, Grams puts a spell on the children to try to end their sibling rivalry, but instead it reverts the sisters back to bickering teenagers.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Paige encounters Captain Black Jack Cutting, an 18th century pirate in search of the Fountain of Youth, the curse on his life becomes her problem. Meanwhile, Leslie manipulates a contest in order to spend time with Phoebe.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: In an attempt to stop a demon on a murderous rampage upon his human relatives, Paige casts a spell that inadvertently blocks all death, and it's up to the Charmed Ones to make things right, when the Angel of Death wants the mess cleaned up.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A blue moon causes problems right after the Elders', suspicious of Leo, assign the sisters a new whitelighter. Meanwhile, Agent Brody tells Paige of a powerful new threat, and Phoebe and Leslie confess their true feelings for each other.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena vigila a Fernando y lo sigue a la caballeriza, Malcolm se interpone en su camino, pero ella consigue una pista. Armando le ofrece a Fernando un apartamento para esconder a Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando trata de violar a Jimena en el campo y Sara se lo impide. Ante las quejas de las Elizondo, Gabriela respalda a su esposo y llama calumniadoras a sus hijas. Rosario acosa a Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar le da su merecido a Fernando, quien pone a Gabriela a elegir entre él y sus hijas, las hermanas convencen a Jimena de que se mude, Armando le pide a Rosario que no vuelva a la hacienda.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora le advierte a Belinda que no revele su paradero, pero Martín ya sabe que ella visita la hacienda. Los Reyes organizan la bienvenida a Jimena, Franco les regala a ella y Óscar una casa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan siente envidia de Óscar y Jimena y presiona a Norma para que también se mude a la hacienda. En un arrebato de celos, Concha llega a la fiesta y le dispara a Leonidas al verlo con Melisa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma asiste a la exposición de caballos, Carmela hostiga a la empleada que cuida al bebé y se queda con él con malas intenciones, Norma se devuelve a tiempo y la saca a empujones del cuarto.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As 11 Teams depart Santa Barbara, Calif. for Santa Barbara, Argentina, one team struggles to keep their nerves at bay. Meanwhile, Teams quickly discover winning $1 million may be tougher than expected when they find themselves skydiving at 10,000 feet.

programme.desc: An unexpected beheading occurs as teams polish off a dirty task, and a random act of kindness leaves one team in tears.

programme.desc: The Race takes an unexpected turn when an early alliance is betrayed, and an unforgiving team savors the opportunity to exact their revenge in a game twist.

programme.desc: Gender disparities cause one Team to lose faith when a challenge seems insurmountable, and emotions run high as a Racer must weigh their own well-being against their future in the game.

programme.desc: One determined Racer powers through pain in the wake of a physical misstep, and teams pull out all of the bells and whistles for a larger than life challenge.

programme.desc: The final four Teams battle for the $1 million prize in a grueling two-hour season finale that starts in Japan, where Racers call upon their track skills for an exhausting Japanese game show, and concludes in Hawaii.

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: When Colin Sweeney accuses a television producer of basing an unflattering character and show on his life, Diane and Cary must prove that they are capable of handling his case.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia prepares for a key interview which could impact the outcome of the race for State's Attorney. Also, Louis Canning pressures Florrick/Agos/Lockhart to agree on a settlement in his wrongful eviction case against the firm.

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: The partners of Florrick/Agos/Lockhart find themselves at odds when they voice different opinions regarding the company's future. Also, the firm falls victim to a cyber-hack.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Still reeling from the cyber-hack at her law firm, Alicia is ambushed with questions about her leaked emails during a television interview. Meanwhile, Diane takes on a case that pits her sympathies towards gay marriage.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: When potential voter fraud is discovered in the State's Attorney election, Eli and Alicia take steps to stop a recount by enlisting the help of a well-respected civil rights lawyer, Spencer Randolph.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia faces an uncertain future when she is forced to resign as State's Attorney in the wake of a voter fraud scandal. Oliver Platt guest stars.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: When a former client calls Alicia after being charged with murder tied to a case from 2009, Alicia reviews the old case, prompting memories of her early days as a lawyer.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia's professional future hangs in the balance as she decides what's next for her career. Michael J. Fox guest stars.

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: One year after the final episode of "The Good Wife," an enormous financial scam has destroyed the reputation of lawyer Maia Rindell, while wiping out her mentor and godmother Diane Lockhart's savings. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he discovers six creatures with supreme senses, like the animal with the most powerful snout, to a creature with razor-sharp eyesight. Crocs, Elephants, Sharks, Bats, Peregrine Falcons and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Greatest Apes
programme.desc: There are more than 200 different kinds of primates in the world today, but did you know only five are members of the exclusive club of great apes? Come along with Jack as he counts down his greatest great ape encounters!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack on a whale-watching safari to Catalina Island where he meets a Humpback Whale, Fin Whale, loads of Dolphins, California Sea Lions, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack enters the Mouth of Bull, in Panama's Bocas del Toro! Poison Dart Frogs, Snakes, Jellyfish, Sloths and so much more on this adventure to Panama's Caribbean Coast!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue meet up with renowned conservationists Chryssee and Esmond Bradley Martin in Kenya and see hyenas, warthogs, and even a cheetah, before searching for white rhinos in Nairobi National Park.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his daughter Suzanne as they put their skills to the test at Shamwari's Ranger School where they must experience everything from driving a 4x4, to tracking animals on foot, including a very up-close look at a pride of hungry Lions.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: On Vancouver Island, in British Columbia, Jack and his daughter Kathaleen experience Canada from above and below the water.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family for an unforgettable adventure through Alberta, Canada! Jack kicks off his journey in Waterton – home to the world's first international peace park – before heading into the Canadian Rockies in search of moose.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets creatures armed with superb scales, like Nile Crocodiles, Galapagos Tortoises, Thorny Devils, an African Rock Python, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack treks deep into the rainforests of Gabon in search of Mandrills. The elusive and brightly colored primates are the largest monkeys in the world, and can only be found in Africa's equatorial rainforests.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads to Seminole country in the Florida Everglades and gets way more than he bargained for. This adventure's got him uncovering alligator nests, and wranglin' some big gators that need to be released back into the wild.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Ecuador's diverse landscapes are home to loads of unique creatures. Visit the Mashpi cloud forests, home to hummingbirds and bushmasters; witness birds of prey in flight near Otavalo's colorful markets; and the Quito Zoo welcomes a baby jaguar.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Against all Odds
programme.desc: Today, see six special stories of survival. Battling everything from injuries to extinction, meet the amazing creatures that beat the odds.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathleen depart Juneau, Alaska aboard the Wilderness Explorer in search of the endless natural beauty of Glacier Bay. Among their encounters: are bears, humpback whales, and glaciers. Jack also explores an old gold mine.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets some animals that stockpile food and supplies. Check out the fascinating behaviors of Leaf-cutter Ants, Bears, Leopards, Honey Bees, Camels and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack heads south from the tip of South America to the frozen wonderland of Antarctica. During his adventures, Jack experiences a colony of Gento Penguins and the desolation of Deception Island.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he heads back to his old stomping grounds near Knoxville, Tennessee! He takes his family to his old farm, the Knoxville Zoo, and the University of Tennessee for a special visit with Smokey the Dog.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Extreme Destinations
programme.desc: From the mountain gorillas of the Impenetrable Forest, the Andean cat of the Atacama Desert, to the penguins of Antarctica, join Jungle Jack as he counts down the most extreme animal destinations on the planet!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In South Africa, Jack checks out the endangered species breeding program at Sable Ranch. Jack's ranch adventures include a helicopter round up of sable and roan antelope, as well as the trans-location of a white rhino.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Back to the Wild
programme.desc: When animals get injured in the wild, conservationists and veterinarians step in to lend a helping hand. In this Wild Countdown Jack is counting down six special stories of lucky creatures returning to their native habitats!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they visit an Australian rainforest and have birds eating out of their hands. Then the whole family goes climbing to find out how life is like in the treetops and Jack discovers a rare wild bird.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: The animals on today’s show like to stick together. Join Jungle Jack as he counts down the planet’s party animals, like baboons, buffalos, flamingos, painted dogs, and more wildebeest than you can imagine!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets some wild canines from around the world! From man’s best friend to African wild dogs, dingoes, jackals, wolves, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Predator Alert
programme.desc: Aggressive carnivores sometimes seem like the bad guys of the animal kingdom, but top predators play an essential role: keeping nature in balance. Today, Jungle Jack is counting down nature’s supreme hunters, like lions, crocs, leopards and hyenas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack's Scariest Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a heart-pounding adventure with lions, crocs, king cobras, sea snakes, bats and Tasmanian devils!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Gabon is home to some of the wildest beaches on the planet, and Pongara is no exception. Come along with Jack as he witnesses one of nature's most awe-inspiring feats -- one-ton Leatherback Sea Turtles returning to shore to lay their eggs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Black & White
programme.desc: What do penguins, skunks and colobus monkeys have in common? These colorful creatures will show everyone why black and white is unforgettable. Join in as Jack counts them down to number one!

programme.desc: Crew members become matchmakers when a man offers a handsome reward to anyone who can find him a good woman. Plus, a teen girl traveling with her mother faces potential humiliation when she runs into a former boyfriend.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A doctor and his lawyer girlfriend find their relationship on trial when he meets an old friend. Meanwhile, Gopher flips for his former schoolteacher, and a young man tries to impress his father when he meets two women.

programme.desc: The captain and his crew suspect that a beautiful woman is trying to kill her millionaire husband, while a glamorous divorcee (Eva Gabor) tries to get reacquainted with her son, who prefers the company of his father.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A mindreader meets a man and uses the reading to improve her chances at getting his attention. Meanwhile, Capt. Stubing's friend brags about his son's accomplishments, but Vicki hears a totally different story.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison…When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas receives a series of mysterious threatening notes from an ex-convict with a grudge.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: To keep his invalid mother happy, an outlaw forces Lucas and Mark to go along with a masquerade that he is the owner of Lucas's ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A sharecropper enters his colt in a horse race hoping to win enough money to buy his farm from the owner who has bet on Mark McCain's entry.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas hires an ex-con as a ranch hand, the man is the first one under suspicion when a robbery and murder occur in the area.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas helps his former Army captain, now an undercover federal agent, infiltrate a gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas finds himself involved in murder when he gallantly steps to the aid of a beautiful woman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An ex-convict is blamed for a brutal crime despite his claims of rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is out for vengeance when Mark is used as a pawn in a bank robbery scheme.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas shoots a horse thief who turns out to be a member of the Boyle clan. Now Ma Boyle is after him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Seven condemned murderers escape and take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tracks an escaped prisoner to a town that turns out to be run by the gunman's brother who is notorious for shooting people in the back.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshall Torrance out of town, Only Lucas can stop him from lynching a local man who killed one of the members of his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former army captain comes to North Fork to kill the man who shot down his son in a gunfight - Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The widow of a bandit killed by Lucas plots a grotesque revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his friend become trapped in an old mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark attempt to reform a con-man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas encourages a drunken artist charged with murder to use his talents to identify the true killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark try to persuade a persecuted young mute to return stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A lively old lady arrives in town hot on the trail of a notorious bandit and the reward money for capturing him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A doctor seeks revenge on the man he blames for ruining his practice.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas unmasks a killer posing as a door-to-door seed salesman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance run into trouble while transporting a captured killer back to face trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deathbed request from an old friend sends Lucas to a neighboring town in search of the man's long-lost sweetheart.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A dying man demands his family wear masks that he's given them at a Mardi Gras party.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man's wish to listen to loud noise backfires.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Major Ivan Kuchenko is trapped inside a hotel room with Commissar Vassiloff, a hitman, and Boris, his assistant, in the room across the street. Vassiloff has planted a bomb in the room and Ivan must find it within three hours or be blown to bits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bob and Millie wake up to find they are in a strange town. Everything appears to be props - trees, animals even cars.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jared Garrity arrives in the Old West town of Happiness, Arizona, proclaiming he can revive the dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A factory CEO replaces human workers with machines.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Two unhappy children find a happy escape in a swimming pool.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: The group becomes severed, putting lives in jeopardy; in Woodbury, Merle approaches the Governor to make a request.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick struggles after another loss; Michonne grows more suspicious of the Governor, who throws a party for the people of Woodbury.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea and the Governor grow closer while Michonne makes a decision about Woodbury; Glenn and Maggie go on a run; Rick struggles with grief.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick tries to save one of his group; Woodbury is in disarray; new guests at the prison raise concerns.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group debates the next step; Rick searches for a lost friend; Daryl and Merle question their choices; the Governor restores order.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Realizing they're running out of supplies, the group must make a choice when security is threatened; Andrea goes to the prison to attempt a negotiation.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Realizing they are outgunned, Rick leads an expedition to get more weapons and fortify their group against the Governor and his forces.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the Governor convene for a tense negotiation of a peace treaty between their respective groups, hoping to prevent more deaths.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Governor chases a fleeing dissenter; while the Governor is gone, a traitor tries to sabotage his plans.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group learns that a truce with the Governor must come with a huge sacrifice on their part; Rick decides Michonne's fate.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the Governor's impending attack looms, Rick and the others consider whether the prison is worth defending; Andrea struggles to escape captivity.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group lives a more peaceful life at the prison and strives to hold onto humanity; problems arise when Rick encounters a new survivor.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Facing a new enemy, Rick abandons his quiet lifestyle so that he and the others can fight to protect their hard-won livelihood.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo encuentra muchos obstáculos tratando de encontrar estabilidad y seguridad, pero a veces lo único que los guía es la esperanza.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Justo cuando Rick piensa que va a poder relajarse, se enfrenta a múltiples peligros inmediatos. Otros integrantes del grupo lidian con su pasado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Enfrentados a la supervivencia diaria fuera del refugio, un simple pedido de uno de los integrantes del grupo conduce a una misión extraña pero instructiva.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras un grupo encuentra lo que podría ser un refugio ideal, otro grupo se da cuenta de que la mejor protección es la que brindan las personas que los acompañan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de encontrar un lugar idílico para establecer un nuevo refugio, el grupo comienza a cuestionarse si es posible que las cosas vuelvan a ser como eran antes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aunque algunos sobrevivientes crean que deben ser brutales para mantenerse con vida, vemos que la fe a veces puede ser la herramienta de supervivencia más poderosa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras múltiples caminos se entrechocan, Rick se enfrenta cara a cara con la brutalidad más absoluta. ¿Él y su grupo tendrán lo que hace falta para sobrevivir?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En el comienzo de la quinta temporada, conoceremos las verdaderas intenciones de la gente de Terminus; mientras, Rick y el grupo se encuentran rodeados, superados en armas y en número.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Con pocas provisiones, y sin poder confiar en la gente a su alrededor, Rick lidera una misión donde el riesgo podría ser mucho mayor que la recompensa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Enfrentados a un grupo de personas despreciables, Rick y sus compañeros deberán idear un plan para obtener una ventaja decisiva.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En este episodio conoceremos a otro grupo de sobrevivientes. Pero lo que parece seguro y agradable por fuera tiene también un lado oscuro.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Nuevos problemas generan nuevas disputas en el grupo durante una misión. ¿Conseguirán superar las diferencias y sobrevivir a este desafío?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En una heroica misión de rescate, algunos miembros del grupo deben volver a un lugar familiar. El escenario será tan grande como el riesgo de la misión.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Atareado con la resistencia en la iglesia y con una misión de rescate, el grupo podría colapsar. ¿Será este un punto de ruptura para los sobrevivientes?

programme.desc: Agent Gordon has a vivid nightmare about a prisoner's mother's ghost who attempts to clear the name of her son, imprisoned 35 years.

programme.desc: James West is tried by a court of cutthroats who believe he has murdered his friend and fellow agent, Artemus Gordon.

programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon tangle with an ex-confederate colonel who possesses the power to control the fourth dimension.
